parameters.functionCode:
const scripts = [
  `SELECT usuarioid, SUBSTRING(mail,1,CHARINDEX('@gmial.com', mail)-1)+'@gmail.com'
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '%@gmial.com'`,
  `SELECT usuarioid, SUBSTRING(mail,1,CHARINDEX('@hotamil.com', mail)-1)+'@hotmail.com'
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '%@hotamil.com'`,
  `SELECT usuarioid, SUBSTRING(mail,1,CHARINDEX('@hotmaill.com', mail)-1)+'@hotmail.com'
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '%@hotmaill.com'`,
  `SELECT usuarioid, SUBSTRING(mail,1,CHARINDEX('@hotmal.com', mail)-1)+'@hotmail.com'
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '%@hotmal.com'`,
  `SELECT usuarioid, SUBSTRING(mail,1,CHARINDEX('@homail.com', mail)-1)+'@hotmail.com'
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '%@homail.com'`,
  `SELECT * 
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '%sincorreo%'
     AND Eliminado != 1
     AND PublicacionComprobantes != 0`,
  `SELECT mail, LTRIM(RTRIM(REPLACE(mail,CHAR(9), '')))
   FROM usuario
   WHERE mail LIKE '% %'`
];
return scripts.map(s => ({ json: { script: s } }));
